description: Decree, possibly. Parts of three lines from the left side; second line reads "in shā allāh taʿālā." Wide line-spacing. Between lines 2 and 3 there is mirror-writing, presumably the imprint from another text or from the right side of this one.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
